rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference visible ports.
Use component implementation annexes for bindings and assignments that are valid in that scope.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on the visibility of ports and features.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents in component type annexes.
Only include assumptions and guarantees that directly correspond to visible identifiers in the AADL model.
Use constants and equations in AGREE contracts to express range and dependency relationships.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should use visible ports and features; implementation contracts may use subcomponent bindings.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement or compatible with the AADL data type.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
